sourceTitle: File:New York Midtown Skyline at night - Jan 2006 edit1.jpg
description: A 20 segment panoramic image of the New York Midtown skyline as viewed from the Empire State Building at night (looking North). Taken with a Canon 5D and 85mm f/1.8 lens at f/1.8, ISO 800 and 1/40s exposures.
